title: Sentinel Shield filesystem-safety reason codes
description: The CLOSED, STABLE catalog of reason tokens emitted by scripts/lib/filesystem-safety.sh when a filesystem trust-boundary check fails closed. Each token is a machine-stable discriminator a caller may surface in a diagnostic, journal, or JSON record. The library function fs_reason_codes prints exactly this set (one per line); tests/prod/252-filesystem-boundaries.sh cross-checks the two so the enum can never drift from the code. Contains NO secrets and NO paths.

schema.description: Fixed discriminator for this catalog shape.

reason_codes.description: The complete, closed set of stable reason tokens the library can emit.
